category_sources: Official GitHub README describes terminal image viewing, animated GIF playback, scrolling images, and video playback.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal image and video viewer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is hzeller/timg and homepage redirects to that repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation and includes synopsis, options, examples, and installation/build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README mentions terminal graphics modes including Sixel, Kitty, and iTerm2, plus image/video viewing.
source_facts.executables lists timg as a CLI executable.
